t_ch: 被团成一团的包装纸，展开便能看到出自茶饮品牌「仙人快乐茶」。
t_en: A crumpled up packaging of the tea brand Immortal's Delight.

t_ch: 不行啊停云小姐，就算是留下线索，也不能到处乱扔垃圾啊。
t_en: No Miss Tingyun! You can't throw trash even for leaving behind clues.

t_ch: 一枚雕琢成锦鲤形状的精巧扇坠，被孤独地弃置在了街道不为人知的角落里。
t_en: A refined pendant of a fan in the shape of a koi, but is left alone in some forgotten corner of the street.

t_ch: 听说在仙舟民俗中「鱼」象征着丰足。你依稀记得游鱼交洄的形状也出现在停云小姐持有的扇子上。
t_en: It is said that in the culture of the Xianzhou, "fish" represents affluence. You vaguely recall that you have seen the pattern of fish swimming around each other on the fan of Miss Tingyun.

t_ch: 这是一张来自天舶司的罚单，看起来再普通不过。
t_en: A fine comes from the Sky-Faring Commission. There's nothing special about it.

t_ch: 但，接渡使停云小姐会给人开交通罚单么？
t_en: But... would Amicassador Tingyun issue traffic tickets to anyone?

t_ch: 你捡到了一份来自「廿四协会」邀请函。
t_en: You picked up an invitation from the Club of the Twenty-Four.

t_ch: 上面写着「廿四协会由<unbreak>23</unbreak>人组成，成立的目的，就是在每个月的二十四号，凑一桌人去吃至味盛苑的德悦全席」。
t_en: The invitation reads: The Club of the Twenty-Four, consisting of <unbreak>23</unbreak> people, is aimed to taste the set menu Virtue and Delight at the Garden of Gourmet every month on the <unbreak>24</unbreak>.

t_ch: 显然，有人背叛了组织。
t_en: No wonder, someone has betrayed their club.

t_ch: 没想到又来了客人，想吃些什么？我这边推荐来一份缘虾饼如何？
t_en: More customers? You're a sight for sore eyes these days. So, what do you have in mind? I'd recommend our prawn crackers.

t_ch: 又来了客人？
t_en: Someone was here before us?

t_ch: 刚才有一位狐人小姐姐，点了一份鸣藕糕。
t_en: A foxian lady. She ordered a songlotus cake and went on her way.

t_ch: （展示停云的照片）
t_en: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

t_ch: 请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐路过？
t_en: Have you seen this lady?

t_ch: 你们认识啊，刚才那位狐人小姐点了一份貘馍卷便离开了。
t_en: So you know each other! She ordered a tuskpir wrap and went on her way.

t_ch: 还有什么好吃的？
t_en: What else is on the menu?

t_ch: 琼实鸟串、貘馍卷、热浮羊奶…刚才还有一位狐人小姐姐，点了份鸣藕糕，也非常好吃。
t_en: Berrypheasant skewers, tuskpir wraps, steamed puffergoat milk... Oh, a foxian lady just ordered a songlotus cake — they're great too.

t_ch: 喂喂，{NICKNAME}，你怎么光顾着看起吃的来啦！
t_en: Hey {NICKNAME}, we're not on a food tour, remember?

t_ch: 请问这位狐人小姐现在在哪？
t_en: Do you know where the foxian lady might be now?

t_ch: 刚才还在这附近的，我想想，她往迴星港的方向去了，应该就在那边儿。
t_en: She was just here, give me a second... Oh, she was heading towards Stargazer Navalia — that's my guess.

t_ch: 抱歉啦亲，您赶得不巧，今天敝店得早早打烊了……
t_en: Apologies, you've come at a bad time. Our shop is closing earlier than usual today...

t_ch: 刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
t_en: Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?

t_ch: 狐人女孩？确实，敝店的镯子吊坠深受狐族姑娘的喜爱，当然……
t_en: A foxian girl? Well, our bracelets and pendants are extremely popular among foxian customers...

t_ch: 像{F#小姐您}{M#您身边这位}这般俊俏的美人儿自然也不能错过。要不要试戴一下最新推出的这款「琢月」系列……
t_en: ...and I'm sure this pretty young lady won't want to miss out on our Verdant Luna selection. Please, try anything you like...

t_ch: 试试就试试吧…
t_en: It couldn't hurt...

t_ch: 喂，{NICKNAME}，你忘了咱们是干嘛来了？
t_en: Hey, {NICKNAME}, remember what we're here for?

t_ch: 想向您打听个人……
t_en: We were just wondering if you could help us find somebody...

t_ch: 对不起，只想打听个人…
t_en: Sorry, we were just wondering if you could help us find somebody...

t_ch: 我就知道，谁会赶这会儿功夫来买首饰啊。狐人女孩啊，让我想想……
t_en: *sigh* I knew it, nobody has time for jewelry in these trying times... A foxian girl you say? Let me think...

t_ch: 我刚刚见着咱们店里的大客户，停云小姐她……
t_en: I did just see Miss Tingyun walk by. She's a big patron of ours...

t_ch: （展示停云的照片）
t_en: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

t_ch: 有没有见过这位小姐姐？
t_en: Have you seen this lady?

t_ch: 哎哟这不是停云小姐么？咱们店里的大客户。
t_en: Well that's Miss Tingyun! She's a big patron of our shop.

t_ch: 你们几位找她是有何贵干？该不会……
t_en: May I ask why you're looking for her? Surely she...

t_ch: 我们是她的客人…
t_en: We're her guests...

t_ch: 难怪瞧你们一身打扮，像是从其他世界来的吧。
t_en: I should've guessed from your attire — you look like you're from another world.

t_ch: 停云小姐时不时会带些商团的外宾来星槎海游览…我刚才一晃眼还瞧见她呢，正往街道里边走。
t_en: Miss Tingyun sometimes takes intergalactic business delegates on tours around Starskiff Haven... In fact, I just saw her walk by, she was heading down the street.

t_ch: 这位客官，我看您眼生，是打算到茶馆里吃茶的吗？
t_en: Ah, new patrons I see! Looking for some refreshment at the teahouse?

t_ch: 不巧，「不夜侯」刚刚关张。您要是想喝茶，恐怕得等云骑军排查危险结束，一切太平以后了。
t_en: Sadly there have been fewer and fewer bookings since the lockdown, so we decided just now to close the Sleepless Earl until further notice. We'll reopen once the Cloud Knights finish addressing their "security concerns."

t_ch: 刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
t_en: Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?

t_ch: 客官您问的可不就是「不夜侯」的老板娘吗？
t_en: Unfortunately yes, the boss is never far away.

t_ch: 停云小姐…是这儿的老板娘？
t_en: Miss Tingyun... is your boss?

t_ch: 误会误会。原来您想打听的是刚路过的停云姑娘啊……
t_en: No, no, my apologies, different foxian. If it's Miss Tingyun you're looking for, she was here a moment ago...

t_ch: （展示停云的照片）
t_en: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

t_ch: 请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐？
t_en: Any chance you've seen this lady?

t_ch: 原来您是要找停云姑娘啊……
t_en: Ah, so it's Miss Tingyun you're looking for...

t_ch: 她在咱们这儿点了一杯「仙人快乐茶」就离开了。刚刚见她的时候，正在街边小吃摊那儿转悠呢。客官可以去那里找找。
t_en: She ordered a cup of Immortal's Delight and went on her way. I saw her checking out the food stalls over there, that might be a good place to start.

t_ch: 我们可是很认真地在配合她练习哎！她竟然还有心思吃点心？
t_en: *sigh* Here we are sweating over our training while she's busy sampling dim sum!

t_ch: 这位客人这个时候来「赎珠阁」…嗯，面无愁容戚色，看来您不是来典当的。
t_en: Curious timing for a visit to Jeweler's Pagoda... Hm, your faces... no sadness or misery. I take it you're not here to pawn anything?

t_ch: 刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
t_en: Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?

t_ch: 这儿是典当铺，专供周转济急之用。不过您要找的人嘛……
t_en: Well, we're a pawn shop — we see plenty of customers. But let me see if I can recall the lady you're looking for...

t_ch: （展示停云的照片）
t_en: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

t_ch: 请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐路过？
t_en: Have you seen this lady?

t_ch: 这儿是典当铺，专供周转济急之用。不过您要找的人嘛……
t_en: Well, we're a pawn shop — we see plenty of customers. But let me see if I can recall the lady you're looking for...

t_ch: 我见那姑娘从这儿路过，往小吃摊的方向去了，客人可以去那边逛逛。
t_en: I remember, she walked past my shopfront and headed over to the food stalls. I'd recommend asking over there.

t_ch: 等云骑军排查危险结束之后，欢迎客人再来赏光。
t_en: Do come back when the Cloud Knights finish their business.

t_ch: 哎呦，客人来照顾我家生意啦。来！慢慢挑，慢慢选，这些小礼物带回家乡可最体面了。
t_en: Customers! Take your time, I've got plenty of good stuff here. Lots of nice gift ideas.

t_ch: 刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
t_en: Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?

t_ch: 唔，似乎是见过，但又好像没见过？您容我想想……
t_en: Yeah! Oh, wait, um... maybe not. Hmm, let me uh... search my memory for a moment...

t_ch: （展示停云的照片）
t_en: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

t_ch: 请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐路过？
t_en: Have you seen this lady?

t_ch: 唔，似乎是见过，但又好像没见过？您容我想想……
t_en: Yeah! Oh, wait, um... maybe not. Hmm, let me uh... search my memory for a moment...

t_ch: 嘶，您要是，咳咳，能在敝店买个什么，也许能帮助我加快回忆？
t_en: Ahem, if only business were better, perhaps my memory would start to improve... don't you think?

t_ch: 这根本就是借机推销吧？是敲诈吧？
t_en: You just want us to buy your things! This is extortion!

t_ch: 买！买了！
t_en: I'll take it!

t_ch: 在离开列车前，姬子给了你一百信用点零花钱。现在也许是用上它的时候了。
t_en: Before you leaving the Express, Himeko gave you <unbreak>100</unbreak> credits as pocket money. Maybe it's time to spend them.

t_ch: 你颤抖着打开手机，对仙舟物价一无所知的你祈祷着这儿的货物价格不要太贵……
t_en: You swiped to open your phone with trembling hands. You barely know anything about the prices on the Xianzhou. Hope you can still afford it...

t_ch: 没见过。
t_en: ...Didn't see her.

t_ch: 你、你退钱！
t_en: Refund! Immediately!

t_ch: 我可没有逼两位花钱啊。我只是说买了能帮助我回忆。但我确实不记得有这么个姑娘路过嘛……你也不希望我随便编一个答案吧？
t_en: Hey, I didn't force you to buy anything, did I? I was simply commenting on my memory. And now I remember that I didn't see your foxian lady... I mean, surely you don't want me to make up an answer and point you in the wrong direction?

t_ch: 不买！
t_en: Not gonna happen!

t_ch: 不买！
t_en: Not gonna happen!

t_ch: 那就只能恕我记不得啦。
t_en: Then you'll have to pardon my bad memory.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，看来咱们在这儿也没什么收获啦，换个地方找找吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, doesn't look like we're gonna get anything from him. Let's go search somewhere else.

t_ch: 刚才看到有美女路过…
t_en: I just saw a pretty lady go past...

t_ch: 咱们今天真是来对了。
t_en: Man, we really came to the right place today.

t_ch: 对什么对啊？
t_en: The right place? Really?

t_ch: 封锁期间在这说相声…
t_en: Doing a crosstalk here during a blockade...

t_ch: 这多亏啊！没有观众。
t_en: Means we get no audience. That's a loss!

t_ch: 你这话我就不爱听了。
t_en: Now now, that ain't right.

t_ch: 虽然观众来得少…
t_en: The audience might be sparse...

t_ch: 但是美女是真的美。
t_en: But the ladies sure are pretty.

t_ch: 去你的吧！
t_en: Shut your pie hole!

t_ch: 咱店里全是贵重物品…
t_en: My store is full of treasures...

t_ch: 干脆还是早点打烊吧。
t_en: Better shut the store early then.

t_ch: 骁勇云骑清危险，
t_en: Brave Cloud Knights clear out danger,

t_ch: 小小茶馆早关张。
t_en: Little teahouse closes up all-eager.

t_ch: 今日实在不宜行商…
t_en: It's not a good day for flogging wares...

t_ch: 琼实鸟串——
t_en: Berrypheasant skewers —

t_ch: 貘馍卷——
t_en: Tuskpir wraps —

t_ch: 热浮羊奶——
t_en: Steamed puffergoat milk —

t_ch: 港区封锁，清仓处理——
t_en: Docks are blocked! Closing down sale —

t_ch: 最后三天，最后三天——
t_en: Final three days! Final three days —

t_ch: 谁曾想「迴星港」也有停转的一天；「星河夜转漂迴星，银浦流云学水声」…这是某位诗人描绘当年迴星港造船的盛况。
t_en: Who'd have thought that Stargazer Navalia might become so quiet. "Long were the nights, when the clangor of hammers rose to meet the stars." ...People used to write poems about the shipwrights here.

t_ch: 罗浮内外的通航全都仰赖星槎往来。迴星港的生产线一断，仙舟内外航行的路线恐怕也得暂歇一段时日。
t_en: The Luofu relies on the starskiffs produced here to transport people and goods. Now that work in the shipyard has stopped, our internal transport and outbound flights might also grind to a halt.

t_ch: 嗨呀，也好。也省去我随团出使的活儿了。
t_en: *yawn* Of course, the silver lining is I don't have to go on as many trips anymore.

t_ch: 停云小姐，你看起来倒是一点也不为仙舟担心啊？
t_en: You don't seem to worry too much about the Xianzhou, Miss Tingyun.

t_ch: 哪儿的话。经商讲究的是个「喜怒不形于色」嘛。再说联盟经历的风浪多了，今日之乱，也不算什么大事。
t_en: I wouldn't say that — a good businesswoman doesn't wear her heart on her sleeve. Besides, the alliance has weathered plenty of challenges. We can handle this situation.

t_ch: 有言在先，要是真遇上了卡芙卡，请恩公们自管自动手。小女子什么忙也帮不了，能做的也就是在一旁瑟瑟发抖，加油鼓劲什么的啦～
t_en: Just to warn you, if we do run into Kafka, you'll have to do the fighting, benefactors. I'd love to help, but there's very little I can do except cheer you on from the side lines~

t_ch: 你不想参与战斗吗？
t_en: You want to leave all the fun to us?

t_ch: 恩公身手了得，和魔阴身打得有来有回。小女子不过一介文职小吏，万一卡芙卡暴起伤人……
t_en: Not a lot of people out there could've fought the mara-struck like you did. I'm only a civil servant — I can't imagine what Kafka would do to me if I were caught in the fray...

t_ch: 狐族虽不如仙舟人长寿，小女子也还想再过一百几十年安稳日子呢，就饶了我吧～
t_en: We foxians don't live as long as the Xianzhou locals, but I still want to enjoy the hundred-odd years I've got left. You'd do the same in my shoes, wouldn't you?

t_ch: 驭空大人可是命你…
t_en: But Madam Yukong ordered you to...

t_ch: 哎哟～恩公也不必拿驭空大人来压人家吧？
t_en: *sigh* Playing the Madam Yukong card, are we? That's not very heroic now, is it.

t_ch: 司舵大人只是命我接引诸位通行星槎海。和我平常出使天外，周旋客商没什么不同。
t_en: Besides, the Madam Helm Master simply asked me to assist you in navigating around Starskiff Haven. It's no different to any other diplomatic mission or delegate reception.

t_ch: 碰到战斗，小女子既不擅长，也从不拿生命冒险。能借来「谛听」，已是尽了最大的心意啦。
t_en: I was never much of a fighter, and I'm not one for risking my life either. Getting Diting into your hands is already beyond the realm of my job description.

t_ch: 下次见到驭空，我一定好好打个报告。
t_en: I'll definitely be putting in a few words next time we meet Yukong...

t_ch: 不要紧，我们绝不勉强停云小姐。
t_en: Understood. We won't put you out of your comfort zone, Miss Tingyun.

t_ch: 一旦遇上卡芙卡，追捕和战斗交给我们。辛苦你替我们引路了。
t_en: When we run into Kafka, we'll do the fighting — and the capturing for that matter. Thank you for showing us the way.

t_ch: 可疑的线索应该就是这些了…但，它们都是卡芙卡留下的吗？还是故布疑阵？
t_en: I think we've rounded up all our suspicious clues... but did Kafka leave them behind on accident or on purpose?

t_ch: 从数量上看，是在故意戏耍我们吗？
t_en: She sure did put a lot of work into this gag, and I think we're the punchline.

t_ch: 我都能想象那个女人一脸故弄玄虚的表情，一字一顿地说「来、抓、我、呀」的样子。
t_en: Ugh. Making us run around like jerks. I bet she's loving this! I can almost hear her whispering: "Come and get me..."

t_ch: 符合她的一贯作风…
t_en: That would be suitably Kafkaesque...

t_ch: 不愧是星核猎手…
t_en: She sure is a Stellaron Hunter...

t_ch: 你这很神往的语气又是怎么回事？
t_en: Ugh, why don't you go and marry her, huh?

t_ch: 毕竟是被星际和平公司重金悬赏，却永远没人能把她归案的通缉犯啊。我们倒像是成了被她暗中观察的猎物。
t_en: Don't forget, she's on the IPC's most-wanted list — a fugitive that nobody can seem to pin down... and now we've become her prey while she stalks us in the shadows.

t_ch: 走吧，恩公，事不宜迟，咱们应该很接近她了。
t_en: Let's go, benefactors, time is of the essence. We must be close.

t_ch: 搜集的线索应该已经足够让「谛听」追踪卡芙卡了。
t_en: We should have enough clues here to get Diting on the move.

t_ch: 快快打开小家伙，让它追着这些线索上的味道，动起来吧！
t_en: No time to lose! Let's give him the scent and let him lead the way.

t_ch: 等等，恩公，我的直觉告诉我，这儿似乎有些不对劲？
t_en: Stay still, benefactors... My instinct tells me something's not right here.

t_ch: 可是这儿什么也看不见啊？是卡芙卡布下的陷阱吗？让小谛听来探一探吧。
t_en: I can't see anything fishy... Did Kafka lay a trap for us? Let's get Diting to investigate.

t_ch: 呜汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: 虽然迴星港停转了，但警铃倒是没有停摆……她是怎么闯过这里的呢？
t_en: Stargazer Navalia may have come to a standstill, but the alarms are operational... How did she get through here?

t_ch: 也许是星核猎手里那个黑客小姑娘玩的把戏。
t_en: I bet that hacker Kafka pals around with had a hand in it.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，多亏了小谛听，咱们才没闯进去。
t_en: Hee-hee, thanks to little Diting, we didn't have to break and enter.

t_ch: 呜汪~
t_en: Woof~

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你怎么那么冒冒失失！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, can you watch what you're doing!?

t_ch: 气息…消失了？
t_en: The scent... where did it go?

t_ch: 当猎物的痕迹突然消失，猎手就该小心了——
t_en: When the trace of the hunted disappears, the hunter better think twice...

t_ch: 因为，那往往是追猎关系逆转的征兆。
t_en: It might mean the tables have turned.

t_ch: 卡芙卡！
t_en: Kafka!

t_ch: 这些云骑没有堕入魔阴身…你对他们做了什么？
t_en: These Cloud Knights aren't mara-struck... What did you do to them?

t_ch: 只是一点小小的暗示，让他们<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>说话而已呀。{NICKNAME}，这你最了解不过了。
t_en: Just a little persuasion to get them to <color=#dbc291ff>listen to me</color>. But you know all about that already, don't you {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 这里不好，太卜要走很长的路，对我也没什么好处。去前面再会吧。
t_en: What a hassle, this place is too far for the diviner. See you up ahead.

t_ch: 冲呀！别让她跑了！
t_en: Quick! Don't let her escape!

t_ch: 三月七，慢点！
t_en: March, not so fast!

t_ch: 还差一点点，各位…欲速则不达。
t_en: So close and yet so far... you'll have to pick up the pace.

t_ch: 可恶，这里完全过不去，得想办法截住她！
t_en: Ugh, there's no way through here, we need to think of a way to cut her off!

t_ch: 恩公，门关了不打紧，我们绕过传送带就行。
t_en: Don't worry about locked doors, benefactors, we can use the conveyor belts.

t_ch: 我可是一直在等你们呐。
t_en: I've been waiting for you.

t_ch: 为了方便你们找到我，我还留下了许多蛛丝…瞧见了没？
t_en: Of course, I didn't want to make things too difficult, so I spun you a broad web... Wasn't that nice?

t_ch: 我瞧见她了！
t_en: I see her!

t_ch: 可恶，这里完全过不去，得想办法抄近路截住她。
t_en: Ugh, there's no way through here, we need to think of a way to cut her off!

t_ch: 欢迎，列车团的各位，你们逮住我啦。
t_en: Welcome, Astral Expressers. Looks like you caught me.

t_ch: 你完了，投降吧！
t_en: You're finished, surrender!

t_ch: 你有权保持沉默…
t_en: You have the right to remain silent...

t_ch: 这也是你的计划。
t_en: This was all part of your plan.

t_ch: 亮牌吧，卡芙卡。我们来到这里，应该都在你的计划之中。
t_en: Admit it, Kafka. You planned for us to come here.

t_ch: 不是计划，是「未来」。我们在无数的未来可能性中施与干涉，将最好的「未来」变成现实。
t_en: I didn't plan anything. It was the future. We interfere on countless future possibilities and make the best future a reality.

t_ch: 不要抬举我们，瓦尔特，星核猎手也只是「命运的奴隶」。
t_en: You speak too highly of us, Welt. The Stellaron Hunters are merely destiny's slaves.

t_ch: 最好的未来？对谁而言最好的未来啊？我才不信你会为别人着想呢。
t_en: Best future? Best for who? As if you'd consider anyone but yourself.

t_ch: 全宇宙——你信吗？当然是：对我而言。
t_en: If I said "best for the universe," would you believe me? Hehe... Best for me, naturally.

t_ch: 投降吧，向仙舟解释。
t_en: Surrender, and save your explanations for the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 要打就打，别拖时间！
t_en: If you want a fight, quit stalling!

t_ch: 我还有很多事想问你…
t_en: I have a lot to ask you...

t_ch: 我们会带你去见罗浮将军，既然你自认清白，不妨向他解释，他自会裁决。
t_en: We're taking you to see the general of the Luofu. You can profess your innocence all you like, but the general will decide your fate.

t_ch: 不行呀，我讨厌按别人的步调做事。
t_en: Oh thanks, but no thanks. I can't stand moving at someone else's pace.

t_ch: 时间不多了，快动手吧，不然就来不及啦。
t_en: We don't have much time. If I were you, I'd make a move before it's too late.

t_ch: 总算来啦。
t_en: Finally.

t_ch: 雕虫小技。
t_en: Rudimentary.

t_ch: 你的一举一动，早在法眼占测之内。
t_en: Your every move has been foreseen.

t_ch: 太卜司，符玄。
t_en: Fu Xuan, Divination Commission.

t_ch: 要犯现在由我接管。
t_en: I'll be taking the criminal from here.

t_ch: 列车团的诸位，初次见面，不，应该说我已在预见中与各位会晤过了。本座是仙舟「六御」之一，太卜司太卜，符玄。
t_en: Greetings, crew of the Astral Express. This is our first encounter... though given that I have encountered you in foresight, perhaps I should say the second. I am Fu Xuan, master diviner at the Divination Commission and one of the Six Charioteers.

t_ch: 有朋远来，本当旨酒倒迎，然天、地、人三元不在当位，只能往后推些个时辰了。咱们先谈正事。
t_en: Far-flung friends ought to be received with fine wine, but alas, the heavens, earth, and body are not aligned for such an occasion. You'll allow for a postponement of the usual formalities, I trust? We should begin with the matter at hand.

t_ch: 你听得懂她说什么吗？
t_en: ...What the actual heck is she saying?

t_ch: 传说中的「掉书袋」吧…
t_en: She's just showing off with some big and fancy words.

t_ch: 联觉信标都翻译不出来…
t_en: Even my Synesthesia Beacon can't make sense of what she said.

t_ch: 咳咳！对本座的说话方式有意见，不妨直说。
t_en: Ahem! If the method of my speech is offensive to you, you need but say.

t_ch: 我们受景元将军的委托来此捉拿星核猎手，感谢太卜出手相助，但人得由我们押送到将军那里。
t_en: We received an assignment from General Jing Yuan to arrest the Stellaron Hunter. Thank you, diviner, for coming to our aid, but we must escort the fugitive to the general.

t_ch: 不必，本座这儿有将军文告，请看。诸位捕获星核猎手之后，即由太卜司接手审问事宜。
t_en: Inessential. I hold a proclamation from the general here, if you care to see. Upon detaining the Stellaron Hunter, questioning and all further arrangements are to be undertaken by the Divination Commission.

t_ch: 不用跟那女人一起走了？将军还挺好心的嘛～
t_en: Did the general just spare us a walk with Kafka? I knew he was a good guy~

t_ch: 我明白了。但将军曾许诺与我们共享情报。卡芙卡交代的每一个字我们都有权知情。
t_en: Understood. However, the general promised that all intel would be shared with us. We have a right to know anything that Kafka divulges.

t_ch: 这个家伙…能不能别给我挖坑啊——
t_en: That guy... Can I go one day without him throwing me under the—

t_ch: 我们不会增添手续，只要旁听审讯就好。
t_en: We won't make things anymore complicated than they need to be. We just want to listen in on the questioning.

t_ch: 好罢，事急从权…你们三个，和我一同去太卜司。
t_en: Very well, urgency demands fluidity... The three of you shall accompany me to the Divination Commission.

t_ch: 不能就地审讯吗？星核猎手多狡猾啊，万一又给她跑了？
t_en: Can't we do the questioning here? The Stellaron Hunters are slippery, what if she makes a break for it?

t_ch: 不能就地审讯吗？
t_en: Here would be better.

t_ch: 小心夜长梦多。
t_en: We shouldn't delay.

t_ch: 你们可靠吗？
t_en: Are you guys up to this?

t_ch: 有本座在，她跑不了。能撬开星核猎手之口，让她吐露实情的手法，唯有在太卜司里方能生效。
t_en: While I am here, she will not escape. Only the Divination Commission has the methods to make her talk and bring the truth to light.

t_ch: 吉时已到，得动身了。各位，请吧。
t_en: The time has arrived. We must depart. Please, proceed.

t_ch: 与符玄一同出发
t_en: Go with Fu Xuan.

t_ch: 暂不动身
t_en: Remain for now.

t_ch: 要「谛听」启动追踪，得先找些线索为引。
t_en: Before Diting can start tracking, you'll have to feed him some leads.

t_ch: 卡芙卡若真在迴星港，多少会留下痕迹。我们散开找找。任何看起来可疑的物件都别放过。
t_en: If Kafka is hiding in Stargazer Navalia, she'll have left behind traces. Let's spread out and look for them — leave no stone unturned.

t_ch: 恩公这是要跑哪儿去？
t_en: Where are you going, benefactors?

t_ch: 当务之急，是先找到可能是由卡芙卡行动留下的线索。
t_en: Our priority now is to find anything that could lead us to Kafka.

t_ch: 汪，呜汪！
t_en: Woof! Woof!

t_ch: 小谛听说它嗅到了特别的东西……
t_en: Diting smells something...

t_ch: 这是……？
t_en: What's this...?

t_ch: …造船监匠人的通行玉符，用来开启门关的。
t_en: ...A jade seal used by the shipwrights. It opens various passages.

t_ch: 有人用完后故意将之破坏，或许是卡芙卡。
t_en: It looks like someone used it and then destroyed it — possibly Kafka.

t_ch: 云骑军武器的一部分，被什么锐利之物削断了……
t_en: Shards of a Cloud Knight's weapon. Something really sharp caused this...

t_ch: 就是那个坏女人没跑了吧？她有把又快又长的刀子。
t_en: It must have been Kafka! She's got a scary sword.

t_ch: 汪，汪！
t_en: Woof! Woof!

t_ch: 知道啦，知道啦，咱们去那边看看！
t_en: I know, I know, let's go and have a look!

t_ch: 手雷？哇！沾了什么东西——噫，是口红……
t_en: Agh! Is that a grenade? What's that on the side... Huh? It's lipstick...

t_ch: 「赠予迷路人的小小礼物…」。
t_en: "A small something for the lost..."

t_ch: 这女人，分明是挑衅咱们！
t_en: Ugh, she's clearly taunting us!

t_ch: 等等，你们看，「谛听」发现了个奇怪的箱子，上面还有掌印……
t_en: Look, Diting found a strange chest... and there's a hand print on it...!

t_ch: 从留下的印迹来看，手指修长有力，又很稳定呢。看起来是一只致命的手。
t_en: Let me see... Slender fingers, but strong. This hand belongs to a killer.

t_ch: 唔？箱子上还夹着一张字条？「喜欢吗？这儿有奖励哦~」
t_en: Huh? There's a note here too. "Take your fancy? There's a reward inside~"

t_ch: 可恶，我们这不是完全被牵着鼻子走了吗？
t_en: Ugh, why do I get the feeling we're not the ones doing the hunting?

t_ch: 卡芙卡似乎完全料中了我们每一步行动…各位，当心陷阱。
t_en: It seems like Kafka predicted our every move... Stay alert, all of you. We could be walking into a trap.

t_ch: 这…不会也是卡芙卡的线索吧？
t_en: Is this... anything to do with Kafka?

t_ch: 这是造船监匠人的焊接枪，可能是冒失的工人留下来的。
t_en: That's a shipwright's soldering gun. I think one of the workers here must have left it behind.

t_ch: 这是什么啊？好像黏土一样。
t_en: What's this? It looks like clay.

t_ch: 杨叔，你看？
t_en: Mr. Yang, any idea?

t_ch: 这恐怕是从流水线上遗落的造船材料，虽然我也认不出这是什么……但这应该和卡芙卡没什么关系。
t_en: I think it might be shipbuilding material leftover from the assembly line, though I can't tell exactly what the substance is... I don't think it's connected to Kafka.

t_ch: 「云阶月地，关锁千重。纵浮槎来，浮槎去，不相逢。」
t_en: "Downy cloud and opalescent moon are set in twain by the seals multitudinous. Neither road nor skiff shall cross the gulf and carry me to thee."

t_ch: 虽然{RUBY_B#翻译装置}联觉信标{RUBY_E#}让每个字都能看懂，但连一块儿就不明白是什么意思…这是卡芙卡留下的东西吗？
t_en: Thanks to the {RUBY_B#machine translator}synesthesia beacon{RUBY_E#} I can understand the characters, but I don't get what any of it means... Is this something Kafka left behind?

t_ch: 这应该只是一首打算送给某人的情诗吧？
t_en: Seems like a love poem to me.

t_ch: 情、情诗？还、还是放回去吧！
t_en: L—Love poem? Quick, put it back!

t_ch: 「仙人…快乐…茶」？
t_en: "Immortal's... Delight"?

t_ch: 「仙人快乐茶」？！
t_en: "Immortal's Delight"!?

t_ch: 这不是什么线索，只是我喜欢喝的茶饮品牌…每天两杯，干活不累。
t_en: This isn't a clue, it's just a brand of tea I like...Two cups a day keeps the tiredness at bay.

t_ch: 等这些事忙完了……
t_en: I could do with a cup once we're done here...

t_ch: 我们俩就是奶茶姐妹！
t_en: Haha, milk tea twins!

t_ch: 啊，这个我知道，家用寻物仪的广告。
t_en: Ah, I know what this is! It's an advertisement for a Home-Use Object Finder.

t_ch: 星际和平公司的广告到处都是，是时候该问候一下他们的贸易专员了。
t_en: There are IPC advertisements everywhere. It's about time I got in touch with their trade commissioner.

t_ch: 又是宝箱上的手印，这个女人真的好闲。
t_en: Another chest, another hand print. Has this woman got nothing better to do?

t_ch: 「为迷宫里乱窜的小老鼠们备下的奶酪~」
t_en: "A little cheese for the rats in the maze~"

t_ch: 她好像是在跟咱玩游戏一样，可恶！
t_en: Rats!? She's playing games with us — I hate her!

t_ch: 呜汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，稍后要看着点小三月，别让她冲动行事。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, keep your eye on March. We can't let her be impulsive.

t_ch: 吉时已到，得动身了。各位，请吧。
t_en: The time has arrived. We must depart. Please, proceed.

t_ch: 战况真激烈呀……
t_en: ...Whoa, looks like the battle here was intense...

t_ch: 看来我们在工造司耽搁时，太卜大人已先行开拔出征啦。
t_en: The master diviner must have launched the campaign while we were delayed in the Artisanship Commission.

t_ch: 是算得「吉时已到」了吧？
t_en: She must have divined it was the right time.

t_ch: 兵贵神速。罗浮仙舟眼下最紧要的就是遏制星核灾变。
t_en: Time is of the essence. The most important task for the Xianzhou Luofu is suppressing the Stellaron.

t_ch: 景元将军把指挥云骑的重任交给太卜，必然知道她会按卜算的结果行动。
t_en: General Jing Yuan tasked the master diviner with commanding the Cloud Knights — he would've known she'd act on the results of her divination.

t_ch: 太卜怎么会乖乖听别人的话？
t_en: I can't imagine Fu Xuan obeying orders to the word.

t_ch: 是啊。景元将军把指挥云骑的重任交给她，必然知道她会按卜算的结果行动。
t_en: Indeed. Since General Jing Yuan tasked the master diviner with commanding the Cloud Knights, he must've known she'd act on the results of her divination.

t_ch: 幸好将军没让咱们跟着云骑…打仗和冒险真的不一样啊，这满地的人…我、我见不得这种大场面。
t_en: Thank goodness the general didn't make us go with the Knights... Fighting is totally different from adventuring. All these people... I—It's tough to bear.

t_ch: 恩公说哪里话，这也算不得什么场面……
t_en: I'm afraid this is nothing, benefactor...

t_ch: 数百年前，某「丰饶」的令使为了劫夺「建木」，率军压境罗浮，几乎摧毁半数洞天，杀得云骑军十不存一。
t_en: Centuries ago, an Emanator of Abundance besieged the Luofu with the aim of taking the Ambrosial Arbor. They destroyed half our delves and killed most of the Cloud Knights.

t_ch: 这样的过去，对长生种来说甚至不算历史，称「昨天」也不为过。与之相比，眼前这不过是小打小闹罢了。
t_en: For long-life species, such events are more like yesterday's memories than ancient history. This awful spectacle is child's play in comparison.

t_ch: 哇，哪有你这么安慰人的！
t_en: Hey, is that supposed to make us feel better!?

t_ch: 也不知道太卜这一仗是输是赢？
t_en: It's hard to tell if the master diviner won or lost here.

t_ch: 想必是大获全胜！
t_en: I think she won total victory!

t_ch: 我觉得也是。倒下的都没几个云骑军，这一仗仙舟应该打得很漂亮。
t_en: I think so too! I can't see many Cloud Knights — the Xianzhou must have fought well!

t_ch: 我看是全军覆没…
t_en: Seems to me, her troops were wiped out...

t_ch: 你是哪边的啊！我看倒下的都没几个云骑军，这一仗仙舟应该打得很漂亮。
t_en: Hey, whose side are you on!? I can't see many Cloud Knights — the Xianzhou must have fought well!

t_ch: 保守点一比一平。
t_en: Let's play it safe and say it was a draw.

t_ch: …你以为是打比赛啊还有平局？我看倒下的都没几个云骑军，这一仗仙舟应该打得很漂亮。
t_en: ...A draw? This isn't a tournament, y'know! I can't see many Cloud Knights — the Xianzhou must have fought well!

t_ch: …未必。如果行军大捷，通常会留下据点和部队置后策应。但这里却没有。
t_en: ...Not necessarily. There'd usually be a base with supporting forces set up after a successful engagement, but we don't see any of that.

t_ch: 四下找找，或许还有线索。
t_en: Let's look around and see if we can find some clues.

t_ch: 太卜大人，您回来了！
t_en: Master diviner! You're back!

t_ch: 久等了，诸位。我已查明「药王秘传」的玄虚。
t_en: I have kept you waiting, but the deceit of the Disciples is laid bare to me now.

t_ch: 战事不利，太卜身先士卒，亲自探察敌情，令人钦佩。
t_en: The conflict is difficult, master diviner, but you have led your forces from the front lines and beyond in pursuit of the enemy. Admirable work.

t_ch: 那…那倒也没什么！演算之事，须卜者亲炙，获得一手情报方能趋近正确结果……
t_en: Hardly! A diviner must acquire first-hand knowledge in order to calculate the future. Collecting intelligence in this way assists me in achieving the right answer...

t_ch: 等等…谁说战事不利来着？「药王秘传」蓄谋已久，手段了得，但我军也未见劣势，怎能说战事不利？
t_en: Wait... what's all this about a difficult conflict? The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been scheming for a long time, but our army is in no way inferior. How can things be so difficult?

t_ch: 接下来，是想让我们上阵了？
t_en: Is this a segue into us joining the fray?

t_ch: 你很机灵嘛。
t_en: Sharp as always.

t_ch: 看看，跟太卜待久了，咱们几个都沾上了未卜先知的毛病了。
t_en: *sigh* I knew we'd spent too long around the master diviner — now we're predicting the future...

t_ch: 你等我们，怕是又有所求吧？
t_en: Just ask for our help already...

t_ch: 看来你已有准备啊。
t_en: It would seem you came prepared.

t_ch: 唉，头一回见你们家驭空大人，她有句话说的可好：「这是仙舟内务，不劳各位挂怀」。
t_en: *sigh* The first time we met Madam Yukong she said something like: "This is a Xianzhou affair and there's no need for the Express to get involved..."

t_ch: 怎么一眨眼，什么苦差事都塞给我们了？公司都没你们会差遣人。
t_en: ...and now here we are running around doing everything. Even the IPC takes it easier on us.

t_ch: 咱猜猜，这回你打算让我们做什么？不会是打头阵…和云骑军一起…冲锋吧？
t_en: Lemme guess, what are we up to this time? Could it be... heading to the front lines? Leading the Cloud Knight charge?

t_ch: 不去不去！本姑娘晕大场面！
t_en: Well try this on for size — nope! I can't stand anymore of this fighting, so there!

t_ch: 谁说要让各位上战场了……
t_en: *sigh* Who said you'd be heading to the battlefield...

t_ch: 没、没有吗？
t_en: W—We're not?

t_ch: 景元吩咐过，各位是因缘际会而来的奇兵，端得一个「奇」字。适才云骑的强攻，乃是示敌以正。用奇之时，就在此刻。
t_en: Jing Yuan's orders. He said that the value of unexpected guests lies in the unexpected. The Cloud Knights' assault was to demonstrate our power to the enemy head-on... now it is time for the unexpected.

t_ch: 各位，请随本座来。
t_en: Please, come with me.

t_ch: 可让我们好等啊。
t_en: You kept us waiting alright.

t_ch: 哼，本座只是客气客气。依着卜算结果，你在这里也没等多久。
t_en: Hmph, I was merely being courteous — according to my divination you've hardly been here long.

t_ch: 何不早说药王秘传的事？
t_en: Why didn't you tell us about the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus earlier?

t_ch: 抱歉，为防机密外泄，「药王秘传」之事只有我和将军知晓。
t_en: Apologies. To avoid dissemination of intelligence, the general and I kept the involvement of the Disciples to ourselves.

t_ch: 这是一个阴谋颠覆联盟的隐秘组织。他们常年潜伏在暗处，这次星核作祟，终于忍不住露了行踪。并且，这一场灾乱与他们也有非同寻常的关系。
t_en: It is a clandestine organization that seeks to overthrow the Alliance. Before the Stellaron disaster, the Disciples had remained veiled in shadow for years. Their emergence reflects their intricate connection to this calamity.

t_ch: 你们别故弄玄虚就好…
t_en: Please tell us the whole truth this time...

t_ch: 抱歉，为防机密外泄，「药王秘传」之事只有我和将军知晓。
t_en: Apologies. To avoid dissemination of intelligence, the general and I kept the involvement of the Disciples to ourselves.

t_ch: 这是一个阴谋颠覆联盟的隐秘组织。他们常年潜伏在暗处，这次星核作祟，终于忍不住露了行踪。并且，这一场灾乱与他们也有非同寻常的关系。
t_en: It is a clandestine organization that seeks to overthrow the Alliance. Before the Stellaron disaster, the Disciples had remained veiled in shadow for years. Their emergence reflects their intricate connection to this calamity.

t_ch: 「晓钟觉迷梦中梦，烟霞聚散身外身」…各位，瞧见那边了罢？
t_en: "Morning bells chime in a dream, evening mist gathers around me"...Do you see that?

t_ch: 好大的丹炉，还在冒烟呢。
t_en: What huge elixir crucibles. There's still smoke coming out of them.

t_ch: 这是古时候丹士们阐演仙道的地方。他们在此建起丹炉，汲取「建木」之力，化奇想为现实。因为炉中烟霭不息，故得名「云霞紫府」。
t_en: This is where the alchemists practiced the way of immortality in ancient times. They erected elixir crucibles here to absorb the power of the Arbor, turning fantasy into reality. Since the smoke from the crucibles never ceases, this place was named Evemist Mansion.

t_ch: 名字虽然风雅，却是兵法上的死地。只要丹炉不熄，云霞缭绕，我们便寸步难近。
t_en: An elegant name, but as far as the art of war is concerned, it's a deathtrap. As long as the crucibles are lit and the smoke continues to linger, we cannot get any closer.

t_ch: 这就是云骑军失控入魔的原因？
t_en: This is why the Cloud Knights lost control and became mara-struck?

t_ch: 正是。「药王秘传」在这散入洞天各处的雾霭中，混入了诱发魔阴身的丹药。
t_en: Indeed. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus infused the smoke that permeates this delve with medicinal pellets that elicit mara.

t_ch: 除非能闭气行军，不然云骑军将不战自溃。因为没人知道身边的战友会在什么时候堕入魔阴身。还有什么比猜忌能更好地瓦解一支军队的士气？
t_en: Unless the Cloud Knights were able to march with their breath held, they would be doomed to fall into disarray. Moreover, no one could know whether their comrade was about to be stricken with mara. Is there anything better than fear for destroying the morale of an army?

t_ch: 云骑的第一次强攻只是掩护，太卜用云骑主力吸引敌人注意，而让我们去熄灭丹炉，止住烟雾。
t_en: The Cloud Knights first assault was just a cover. You're using the main army to attract the enemy's attention, while we douse the elixir crucibles and stop the smoke.

t_ch: 这股烟雾对我们没有影响？
t_en: This smoke can't affect us?

t_ch: 对，这妖雾是专为对付云骑军的杀手锏。
t_en: Indeed. This demonic vapor is a weapon targeted against the Cloud Knights.

t_ch: 「建木」是罗浮禁忌。仙舟联盟素来独立，「药王秘传」的人怎么也料不到将军敢请外援，当然也不会为了对付短生种而作准备。
t_en: The Ambrosial Arbor is taboo for the Luofu, and the Xianzhou Alliance has always been fiercely independent. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus could never have guessed that the general would seek outside help — they won't be prepared against short-life species.

t_ch: 为何不让狐人与持明去试试？
t_en: Why not get the foxians and Vidyadhara to try?

t_ch: 你误会了魔阴身，它不是专对人类生效的诅咒。狐人不易魔阴身，是因为他们虽为长生种，寿命却并不无限；而持明凭借「蜕鳞」抛却旧世。仅就魔阴身而言，长生种是平等的……
t_en: You misunderstand the nature of the mara-struck condition — it is not a curse unique to humankind. foxians don't usually succumb to it because their lifespan is not eternal, yet they are still a long-life species. The Vidyadhara rely on molting to discard the old world. All long-life species are equal in the face of mara...

t_ch: 不过，「药王秘传」的人怎么也料不到将军敢请外援，当然也不会为了对付短生种而作准备。
t_en: However, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus could never have guessed that the general would seek outside help — they won't be prepared against short-life species.

t_ch: 景元将军所说的奇兵，就是这个意思么？
t_en: Is this what General Jing Yuan meant by unexpected guests?

t_ch: 本座不敢妄言。只能说，星核猎手的预言比本座的卜算更准。卡芙卡所求的未来正在一一应验。
t_en: I wouldn't hazard a guess. All I can say is that the predictions of the Stellaron Hunters were more accurate than mine. The future that Kafka seeks is becoming reality... one step at a time.

t_ch: 我不想按他们的预言行动。
t_en: I don't want to act according to their predictions.

t_ch: 我也不想受人摆布。但人们行于命途之上并非独来独往，不受羁绊。每个人的选择除了造就自身，也将同行之人推向前方。
t_en: I do not wish to be their puppet, either. In any case, we do not walk alone and unhindered on our paths. Our choices define us and influence others.

t_ch: 也只有这一条路可走了…
t_en: This is the only way...

t_ch: 是「只有这条路通向了已知最好的结果」，如果可以选，没有人会选择跳下悬崖。
t_en: Rather, only this way leads to the known best result. If we can afford to choose, then none would choose to leap off a cliff.

t_ch: 何况，这并非是我一人的决定……
t_en: Besides, this is not my decision alone...

t_ch: 太卜的职责是趋吉避凶。我不想让自己的选择，令罗浮滑向糟糕的未来。
t_en: The duty of the master diviner is to bring luck and avoid misfortune. I don't want my choice to plunge the Luofu into a terrible future.

t_ch: 言归正传，熄灭丹炉而不受其害，这件事只有你们能办到。意下如何？
t_en: To return to the matter at hand, only you can douse the elixir crucibles without being harmed by them. What say you?

t_ch: 好吧，虽然太卜这回没有说「请」，但谁教这个忙只有咱们能帮。{NICKNAME}，杨叔，我说的对吧？
t_en: Fine. I didn't hear a "please," but seeing as we do kinda have superpowers around here... {NICKNAME}, Mr. Yang, what do you think?

t_ch: 一旦烟雾止息，我会立刻前来，绝不让各位孤军奋战。
t_en: I will come at once when the smoke dissipates — you won't be left to fend for yourselves.

t_ch: 「药王秘传」放弃百年潜伏，选择现在示身，说明其有必胜把握；然而准备再充分，终究是冲着云骑军而来。各位的能力与存在，「药王秘传」丝毫不知，也无法防备。
t_en: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus renounced their century of secrecy and chose to reveal themselves, meaning they feel confident of victory... but no matter how well-prepared they may be, their focus has always been the Cloud Knights. They are completely unaware of your existence and capacity, and in short — cannot be prepared against you.

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 炉鼎…熄灭了。
t_en: So you succeeded in dousing the elixir cauldrons...

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 不要紧，该来的终究还是来了。
t_en: Unimportant. The inevitable is already upon us.

t_ch: 是你啊，丹枢……
t_en: Dan Shu... it's you.

t_ch: 嗯，「药王秘传」必藏身丹鼎司，将军和本座心知肚明。只是捉不住把柄，没法问六司的罪，只好等你自己跳出来了。
t_en: Indeed. The general and I knew that the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus must be hiding in the Alchemy Commission. However, without evidence, we couldn't bring charges before the commissions. We had to wait for you to show yourselves...

t_ch: 也好，将星核邪祟引入仙舟，重生建木，诱人堕入魔阴身…这些大罪，十王司会一条一条同你清算。
t_en: ...and now, your charges are many. Drawing Stellaron spirits into the Xianzhou, resurrecting the Ambrosial Arbor, striking down our people with mara... The Ten-Lords Commission will address these transgressions during your reckoning.

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 罪？如果我所为有罪，那末仙舟的先祖将与我同罪！是他们接受了「丰饶」之赐，将后裔转化成了长生种……
t_en: Crimes? If I am guilty, then all of our Xianzhou ancestors are also guilty! They were the ones who accepted the blessings of the Abundance and turned their descendants into long-life species...

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 「药王秘传」只是走在他们曾经走过的道路上，追求超脱，何罪之有？
t_en: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are only walking on the road our ancestors once took. How is it a crime to seek ascendance?

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 彼时，建木玄根包覆罗浮仙舟，宛如有生之物。我族捭阖星海，无可匹敌。人人皆能得道成仙，自在变化。丰饶神迹降于九艘仙舟，那是何等荣光的时代……
t_en: In days of old, the roots of the Ambrosial Arbor enveloped the Xianzhou Luofu like a living creature. We controlled the stellar seas and none could stand in our way. Everyone could become a celestial and shift form at will. Divine miracles descended onto all nine Xianzhou ships. What a glorious time that was...

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 再瞧现在，仙舟沦落成了何等模样？！甘受妖弓驱使，屡遭丰饶之民涂炭，「十王司」甚至逼迫我们放弃长生……
t_en: How far the Xianzhou has fallen! We consent to be commanded by the Devilish Archer, suffer continuously at the hands of the Denizens of Abundance, and the Ten-Lords Commission even forces us to give up our immortality...

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 可叹啊，我不怪你无知。因为我们没能出生在建木初降的时代，见证那时的奇迹。但现在，我们还有机会，恢复古制……
t_en: How pitiful! I do not blame you for your ignorance — we were not born in the era when the Ambrosial Arbor first descended, nor did we witness its miracles. But now we now have an opportunity to restore the ancient laws...

t_ch: 我以为你有何高论，不过是些追求力量再不做人的老套说辞。
t_en: Hmph... Forgive me for thinking you might have harbored some profound enlightment. Yours is the same old talk of those who seek power... and give up on their humanity.

t_ch: 仙舟先民与帝弓同战，毁弃建木，设立「十王司」划定生死，正是为了重新以人类的姿态活下去。
t_en: Our Xianzhou ancestors fought side by side with the Arbiter, laid waste to the Arbor, and established the Ten-Lords Commission to lay down the lines between life and death... In doing so, we enshrined our future as human beings.

t_ch: 仙人？仙舟之上并无仙人。什么「丰饶」神迹，什么操弄生死，你们的所作所为，不过是妖孽行止罢了！
t_en: Celestials? There are no celestials on the Xianzhou. The "divine miracles" of the Abundance, the manipulation of life and death... Your deeds are nothing but evil!

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 话不投机半句也多。太卜大人，您已做出选择，您抛弃了力量…那是最愚蠢的选择。
t_en: I have nothing to say to you, Master diviner — you have already made your decision. You have discarded power... a most foolish choice.

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 丹士长见过太卜大人…您好像并不意外。
t_en: I have met you before in my capacity as chief alchemist, master diviner... You don't seem surprised.

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 还有你，无名客。你也站在云骑这一边……
t_en: And you, the Nameless. You stand with the Cloud Knights too...

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 「建木」降临…会带来不死的仙躯——
t_en: The Ambrosial Arbor's descent... will bring us undying bodies...

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 赐予我们星核的人…这么说……
t_en: The one who gave us the Stellaron... said that...

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 幻胧…「药王秘传」做到了……
t_en: Phantylia... the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have fulfilled our promise...

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 「绝灭大君」也该兑现承诺…快！就是现在！
t_en: You, Lord Ravager, must do the same... Now! Quickly!

t_ch: 啧啧，为什么要逼我亲自出手呢，这有悖我的「毁灭」美学呀…小卒子。
t_en: Ah ah, little pawn, must you force me to intervene directly? I'm loath to flout my philosophy of destruction.

t_ch: 罢了，看来要从内部崩裂仙舟，还得用别的法子……
t_en: Never mind. It would seem the time has come for other means of dismantling the Xianzhou from within...

t_ch: 这…这…所以，和我们一路同行的停云小姐是军团的人？！
t_en: W—Wait, hold on a second — are you really saying that Miss Tingyun was a member of the Antimatter Legion all along?

t_ch: 她身上冒出的那团火又是什么东西？停云小姐的身体…她的身体又去哪儿了？
t_en: And what was that fire that came out of her? And her body — where did it go?

t_ch: 杨叔，你见多识广，刚才到底发生了什么？！
t_en: Mr. Yang, you're smart. What happened just now!?

t_ch: 那团火焰自称绝灭大君，幻胧。这个名字，我曾经从其他无名客口中听过。
t_en: The flame we witnessed claimed to be Lord Ravager Phantylia — a name I've heard other Nameless speak of in the past.

t_ch: 她是纳努克座下的七位大君之一，钟爱凡人的自毁，许多生灵被她诱入过万劫不复的深渊……
t_en: She's one of seven Lord Ravagers who serve Nanook... and finds pleasure in witnessing the self-destruction of mortals. She's led countless souls down a dark and hopeless path.

t_ch: 言下之意是，那位天舶司的姑娘早已遭其蛊惑，成了军团的走卒？
t_en: ...Meaning that Tingyun had long since fallen under the Lord Ravager's influence?

t_ch: 所以停云…
t_en: That is to say, Tingyun...

t_ch: 她的目标一定是建木！染指建木，有如夺走罗浮的根源，如此一来，覆灭仙舟轻而易举。事不宜迟，必须阻止她！
t_en: Phantylia is aiming for the Ambrosial Arbor! If she succeeds, the Luofu will be deprived of its roots, making its destruction all too easy. We must stop her!

t_ch: 真可惜。还想多观察一阵子呢……
t_en: What a pity. I would've liked to observe it for a while longer...

t_ch: 既然领受了「丰饶」的恩赐，你们应该承受得住「毁灭」的祝福吧？
t_en: Since you received the gift of Abundance, surely you can withstand the blessing of Destruction as well?

t_ch: 停云小姐！
t_en: Miss Tingyun!

t_ch: 杨叔的意思是，真正的停云还……
t_en: You're saying that the real Tingyun is still...

t_ch: 抱歉，三月七，我无法给出肯定的答复。原本的停云身在何方，又是何时被偷梁换柱，随着那具身躯的消散，我们已无从查究。
t_en: I'm sorry March, I can't say with any certainty where the real Tingyun may be, or at what point she was replaced by the impostor. Without knowing where the body vanished to, it'll be tough to get an answer.

t_ch: 这只是我个人的猜想…和希望。如果那就是停云，幻胧为何要多此一举湮灭证据。将遗体扔于故人面前，岂不更符合她的毁灭「美学」？
t_en: At this point, it's all just conjecture and hope. But if that body belonged to the real Tingyun, it does raise the question of why Phantylia would go to such lengths to destroy any evidence of her. Wouldn't it be more in line with her destructive nature to leave Tingyun's remains behind as a display of power?

t_ch: 我相信这才是幻胧的目的——让我们因此身陷混乱和猜疑，彻底落入她的毒计。
t_en: I believe this to be Phantylia's goal — to sow seeds of doubt among us and ensnare us in a malevolent trap.

t_ch: 难怪「药王秘传」兴起叛乱，原来是与军团大君暗中勾结。她伪装仙舟人的样貌，将星核送入罗浮，让我们自相毁灭……
t_en: It's clear that the sudden resurgence of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus is all connected to the Lord Ravager. Pretending to be a Xianzhou citizen, planting a Stellaron on the Luofu — all part of her plan to bring about our self-destruction.

t_ch: …我不这么认为。幻胧钟情于精神与物质双方面的毁灭，由心灵的溃败导向肉体的消亡。
t_en: I don't believe so. Phantylia revels in watching a corrupted mind eating away its host from inside out, until the obliteration of both is achieved.

t_ch: 但停云的言谈举止却不像是受蛊惑，或被操纵，若她不是原本的停云，那更可能是幻胧的化形。
t_en: But there was no indication that Tingyun had been misguided or manipulated... It's possible that the Tingyun we knew wasn't her true self, but an image Phantylia devised to serve her own purposes.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生…
t_en: Mr. Yang...

t_ch: 怪物僵死的身躯上，几处显眼的伤口正以肉眼能辨的速度缓缓收缩。尽管没有任何生命体征，你却觉得眼前这怪物并没有彻底死去。
t_en: On the monster's rigid body, several conspicuous wounds are shrinking at a speed discernible to the naked eye. Despite the absence of any vital signs, you sense that the monster in front of you is not completely dead.

t_ch: 盔甲上留有刀剑的斫痕，令人惊诧的是，这些斫痕全都来自死者自己的武器。
t_en: Its armor is covered in sword marks. But the strange thing is that these marks all came from the deceased's own weapon.

t_ch: 倒下的巨猿身躯庞然如山岩，但它似乎仍有暴起伤人的力量。
t_en: The fallen creature's body lay on the ground like a giant boulder. It looks as though it still has the power to spring back up and attack people.

t_ch: 一头巨大的狼形孽物匍匐在地，你从它的残躯上感受不到生命，但一些细微的幼芽在它的身躯下茵开。
t_en: A huge, wolf-like beast lies on the ground. Its corpse shows no signs of life, but tiny saplings are sprouting from underneath it.

t_ch: 摘去头盔，你直视阵亡云骑的脸。
t_en: Removing the helmet, you look straight into the face of the fallen Cloud Knight.

t_ch: 这张仙舟人特有的不辨岁月的脸旁上凝固着强烈的痛苦。你在他发鬓边找到一簇变异的枝条——他死前似乎正经历炼狱般的折磨。
t_en: An expression of agony is frozen on the face of this Xianzhou man of indiscernible age. You find a cluster of mutated branches at the temples of his hair — he seems to have been subjected to purgatory-like torture before his death.

t_ch: 快看，那儿有人。
t_en: Look, there's someone over there!

t_ch: 这里！这里还有人活着……
t_en: Here! There are still survivors here...

t_ch: 咦，你们不是云骑啊…来这里做什么？很危险的。
t_en: Hmm? You're not the Knights... What is your purpose here? It's dangerous.

t_ch: 我们是将军请来的援助。请问其他人都到哪儿去了？
t_en: We're reinforcements sent by the general. Where's everyone else?

t_ch: 竟把短生种搬来当救兵…嘿嘿，景元真是无人可用了。
t_en: Tsk, resorting to short-life species as reinforcements... Hehe, Jing Yuan is truly running out of options.

t_ch: 快逃！这家伙是…「药王秘传」！
t_en: Run! She's... a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus!

t_ch: 多嘴多舌。我若把你医好，你也会是我们中的一员啊。
t_en: Silence. If my healing worked, you'll become one of us...

t_ch: 所以，你不会让他们逃走的，对不对？
t_en: ...and then it's not just me they'll be running from.

t_ch: 赶快…离开这儿…
t_en: Hurry... leave here...

t_ch: 我控制不住我自己了——
t_en: I can't control myself anymore...

t_ch: 你、你再坚持一下，我们找人来救你……
t_en: H—Hold on! We'll find someone to help...

t_ch: 别浪费时间了，我已被那家伙「转变」，要不了多久……
t_en: Don't waste your time. They've "converted" me. I don't have much longer...

t_ch: 你们快走吧…太卜的人就在前边……
t_en: Go... The master diviner's troops are ahead...

t_ch: 他不再言语，仿佛耗尽了力气，又像是在等你们离开。
t_en: He stops talking. It could be because he is exhausted, or he's waiting for you to leave him be.

t_ch: …走吧。
t_en: ...Let's go.

t_ch: 愿他安息。
t_en: May he rest in peace.

t_ch: 潜伏已久的「药王秘传」竟在这个节骨眼现身了，不知那位太卜有没有算到这一节……
t_en: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were in hiding for so long... now they finally show their face. Did the master diviner fail to foresee this...?

t_ch: 恩公，你们要小心了。药王秘传信奉寿瘟祸祖「药师」，是仙舟的心腹大敌。
t_en: Be careful, benefactors. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus worship Yaoshi the Plagues Author — the greatest enemy of the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 一片狼藉的战场中，某个痛苦的呻吟吸引了你们的注意。
t_en: A painful moan amidst the ravaged battlefield draws your attention.

t_ch: 帝弓庇佑，你们不是「药王秘传」的人……
t_en: Reignbow's blessing... You're not Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

t_ch: 你可别再乱动了，让咱看看有什么办法能让你快点好起来。
t_en: Stop moving around! Let's see if there's a way to help you recover faster.

t_ch: （提供治疗）
t_en: (provides medical attention)

t_ch: 来吧，服下这个，对快速恢复有帮助的。
t_en: Come on, take this. It'll help with your injuries.

t_ch: （暂时放弃）
t_en: (temporarily giving up)

t_ch: 咱们手头竟然没有可以救急的东西吗？
t_en: Don't we have anything to help her?

t_ch: 呃，你等等，我这就去找你的同僚来救你。
t_en: Uhh, you wait here. I'm gonna get your comrades to help you.

t_ch: 别管我了…
t_en: Just leave me...

t_ch: 你们手忙脚乱地从行囊里翻找出能促进伤口愈合的药物，缓缓滴进他的嘴里。
t_en: You fumble through your bag to find medicine for her wounds and administer it one drop at a time.

t_ch: 一时间你们竟有些忐忑，不知道对寻常人类起效的成分，是否还能作用在长生种的身体上？
t_en: For a moment you are worried that medicine made for ordinary humans might not work on long-life species.

t_ch: 云骑军强撑着自己的身体站了起来。
t_en: The Cloud Knight propped herself up so she could stand.

t_ch: 你们…谢谢你们。我感觉自己好多了。
t_en: ...Th—Thank you, all of you. I feel much better now.

t_ch: 幸亏遇见了你们，咱们的驻军就在前面，如果你们想找个地方暂时休整一下，我就在前面等你们。
t_en: Thank goodness you're here... The garrison is up ahead, are you heading there now? I'll wait there for you.

t_ch: 数千年来，联盟一直想祓除这隐秘组织，始终未能如愿。选在这个时刻出世，一定不是偶然。
t_en: The Alliance has been trying to root out their secret organization for millennia — it's no coincidence that they've chosen this moment to reveal themselves.

t_ch: 毕竟，是他们将所有仙舟人转变成了长生种…也是他们自「建木」中研究出了种种不可思议的技术。
t_en: After all, it was they who changed the Xianzhou natives into long-life species... They also developed many incredible technologies from the tree itself.

t_ch: 几位恩公怕是都比我活得长些。
t_en: Even you benefactors have probably lived longer than me.

t_ch: 是谁！报上来意！
t_en: Who goes there? Show yourselves!

t_ch: 等等，是你们啊——几位快些进来，外边危险。
t_en: Wait, it's you...! Quickly, in here! It's dangerous outside.

t_ch: 你认得咱们？
t_en: You recognize us?

t_ch: 你们不是将军请来的客人吗？太卜算到了各位。她吩咐过，一定要等候几位到来。
t_en: Are you not the general's guests? The master diviner prophesied your arrival — we were ordered to wait for you under any circumstances.

t_ch: 符玄不在这儿？
t_en: Fu Xuan was here?

t_ch: 是，太卜命队伍驻扎此处后，便率斥候去前方探查了。据说隐藏多年的「药王秘传」出现在附近，队伍里人心惶惶……
t_en: Yes. The master diviner ordered us to remain stationed here and went to scout ahead. They're saying the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have returned — they haven't been seen for an age... The troops are anxious.

t_ch: 等我们？
t_en: Wait for us?

t_ch: 好在各位来了。太卜说了，几位不到，云骑便不得进发。
t_en: It's good that you're here — the master diviner said the Knights weren't to move out until you arrived.

t_ch: 各位还请到阵中稍候，一切等太卜大人返回后再作主张。
t_en: Please wait in the camp — we'll decide on our next steps once the master diviner returns.

t_ch: 云骑军驻守在此，裹足不前，看来形势并不乐观。「药王秘传」…我在哪里听过这名字，记得是潜伏在仙舟内部，阴谋颠覆联盟的丰饶秘系……
t_en: That the Cloud Knights received orders not to advance is a bad sign. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... I've heard the name before. If memory serves, they're an underground sect of the Abundance that's said to have lain dormant within the Xianzhou, plotting to overthrow the Alliance...

t_ch: 星核的确引起了与丰饶有关的异象，难道药王秘传因此放弃了伪装？不应该啊，云骑的主力丝毫未损…一定有什么我们不知道的事情发生了，太卜不在，向营地里的云骑打听打听吧。
t_en: The Stellaron has certainly caused Abundance-like abnormalities — is that what motivated the Disciples to come out of the shadows? No. The Knight's main force remains intact... Something must have happened — something we're not aware of. The master diviner isn't here — let's head into camp and see what we can learn from the troops here.

t_ch: 那，恩公们不妨先到处看看，小女子找个地方歇歇脚。
t_en: Good idea, why don't you take a look around, benefactors? My feet need a rest.

t_ch: 这位驻守的云骑战士面色铁青。看到你们靠近，他点头致礼。
t_en: There is a ghastly paleness in the face of this resident Cloud Knight. As you approach him, he nods his head in salute.

t_ch: 长话短说吧。请见谅，兵凶战危，现下不是分神闲聊之时。
t_en: Forgive me for being brief — warfare is a dangerous business. There's no time for idle chat.

t_ch: 战况如何？
t_en: How's the situation?

t_ch: 我们按照太卜的军令，几个时辰前攻陷此处。之后我们才知道，原来此行的对手是信奉{RUBY_B#药师}寿瘟祸祖{RUBY_E#}的「药王秘传」。
t_en: We took over this place a few hours ago under the master diviner's command. It was only afterwards that we learned our enemies were none other than the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus — those who worship the {RUBY_B#Yaoshi}Plagues Author{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 原本一切顺利，无论是「药王秘传」的妖人，还是受他们驱使的异兽都不是我们的对手。
t_en: Everything was going as planned. The sorcerers of the Disciples and the fantastic creatures they commanded were no match for us.

t_ch: 但没过多久，行伍里的弟兄姐妹突然不分敌我、肆意砍杀起来……
t_en: ...Then, after a while, our comrades suddenly started to slaughter one another...

t_ch: 是魔阴身…
t_en: They became mara-struck...

t_ch: 可恨！「药王秘传」到底使了什么妖法！
t_en: Curse it! What Sanctus Medicus sorcery did they use on us!?

t_ch: 那些怪物…
t_en: Those monsters...

t_ch: 不止「药王秘传」炮制的怪物，也有我的同袍……
t_en: Yes, among the Sanctus Medicus monsters... there were our comrades.

t_ch: 仙舟人最忌讳将「魔阴身」展露人前，因为那意味着放弃为人，输给了埋藏在长生血脉中的「孽物」…也违背了帝弓的训诫。
t_en: The greatest fear of the Xianzhou people is succumbing to our mara-struck form around others. To do so means that we have given up on being human, lost to the abomination sleeping in our immortal blood... and violated the Reignbow's admonishments.

t_ch: 「药王秘传」所为的，是每个联盟子弟最痛恨的卑劣行径！
t_en: What the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus did are despicable acts that every Alliance resident detests!

t_ch: …我对帝弓咒誓，必为同袍报仇雪恨。
t_en: ...I swear to the Arbiter that I will avenge my comrades.

t_ch: 有个受伤的战士没能归队…
t_en: There's a wounded warrior that didn't make it back to his unit...

t_ch: 感谢各位报知，我这就派人去察看。
t_en: Thanks for your intel. I'll dispatch someone immediately.

t_ch: 一位云骑站在俘虏旁边。你们说明自己的身份和将军的命令后，他不再阻拦你的接近。
t_en: A Cloud Knight is standing next to the captive. He steps aside after you explain your identity and show him the general's order.

t_ch: 想要问话？可以。但我必须全程旁听，这部分内容要一并录入口供。
t_en: You want to ask questions? Fine, but I must be present the whole way through. This part needs to be recorded as testimony.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，总算有个说话的伴儿了。被这群板着脸儿一声不吭的云骑押着…嘻嘻，真无聊啊～
t_en: ...Finally someone to talk to. These Cloud Knights are so serious, so boring, hehe...

t_ch: 关于星核…
t_en: About Stellarons...

t_ch: 那颗发光的种子？哈哈，我见过呀，它可真美。望进去，里面有声音会说话哩……
t_en: That shining seed? Haha, I've seen it, so beautiful. If you gaze into it, there's a voice inside that speaks to you...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你还记不记得…可可利亚。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... do you still remember Cocolia?

t_ch: 魁首说靠着这东西，我们能为「建木」注入新生。嘻嘻，我原本是不信的。
t_en: The master said we could inject new life into the Ambrosial Arbor with it. Hehe, I didn't believe it at first.

t_ch: 咱们想了那么多办法，花了短生种几辈子的时间，「建木」却没有一丝活过来的迹象。
t_en: We tried many methods, spending multiple lifetimes of short-life species, yet the Arbor showed no signs of resurrection.

t_ch: 但现在你瞧——嘻嘻，「唯有星神的力量才能再现神迹」。没错，没错，伟大的药王「丰饶」！
t_en: But look upon it now, hehe — "only the power of an Aeon can recreate the miracle." Yes, yes, the mighty Sanctus Medicus! The Abundance!

t_ch: 关于建木…
t_en: About the Ambrosial Arbor...

t_ch: 你也看到了，对吧！建木重生的样子，嘻嘻，何其壮绝！
t_en: So you witnessed it too? The Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection, hehe... Magnificent!

t_ch: 在长生种都回忆不起的神降时代，药王「丰饶」将建木赐给罗浮仙舟。借着这株神木，人类实现了无数奇迹：息壤、木无患、自在应身…
t_en: In the {RUBY_B#Theophany Era}befall era{RUBY_E#}, so far in the past that even long-life species cannot recall, Sanctus Medicus the Abundance gifted the Ambrosial Arbor to the Xianzhou Luofu. With that sacred tree, humanity realized many miracles: The fallow earth, the western soapberry, the altered flesh...

t_ch: 只可恨妖弓毁掉了一切，颠倒黑白，抹去了药王的一切功绩…不过要不了多久，咱们就能重归神降时代的繁华！
t_en: But that Devilish Archer ruined everything! They twisted right and wrong and erased Sanctus Medicus's achievements... But soon... soon we will return to the glory of the {RUBY_B#Theophany Era}befall era{RUBY_E#}!

t_ch: 你见识过和我们一起战斗的那些异兽了，对吧？这只是「建木」小小的恩赐……
t_en: You've seen the fantastic creatures that fought with us? They are only minor gifts of the Ambrosial Arbor...

t_ch: 住口吧，胡言妄语的鼠辈。云骑军用不了多久就会把你们连根拔起。
t_en: Shut it, rambling rodent. The Cloud Knights will root all of you out soon.

t_ch: 你们对那些云骑做了什么？
t_en: What did you do to these Cloud Knights?

t_ch: 做了什么？我们治好了自己的同胞啊。嘻嘻，被困在孱弱的血肉里，一定很痛苦吧……
t_en: What did we do? We cured our kin! Hehe, it must hurt to be trapped in such weak flesh and blood...

t_ch: 混蛋…我真想现在就砍了他。
t_en: You scum... If the order allowed I would cut you down now.

t_ch: 哦，你们不懂…短生种不懂的。什么「魔阴身」？那是药王所赐的第二生命！消解我执，成就仙体，自由自在的生命！
t_en: Oh, you don't understand... a short-life species couldn't understand. Mara-struck? Bah! It's a second life gifted by Sanctus Medicus! To eliminate the self! To achieve transcendence! A life of true freedom!

t_ch: 我在你的眼睛里看到了对力量的渴望。此生苦短，不是吗？嘻嘻，我可以、我可以让你……
t_en: I see a desire for power in your eyes. This life is too short for you, isn't it? Hehe, I can... I can help you...

t_ch: 别被他的花言巧语蛊惑了。
t_en: Don't listen, his words are poison.

t_ch: 逗他们玩玩罢了，军爷。嘻嘻，没有「丰饶」的赐福，你们短生种可承受不了这种「转变」。
t_en: We're just having fun, sir, hehe... Without the blessing of the Abundance, you short-life species would never be able to endure the transformation.

t_ch: 问完了。
t_en: I don't have any more questions.

t_ch: 只差一点…只差一点啊……
t_en: It was so close... so close...!

t_ch: 服役三百年的老人都变成了…那种不人不鬼的模样！只差一点…只差一点我就……
t_en: Even seasoned soldiers — soldiers of three centuries were turned into... twisted beings! I was almost... almost...

t_ch: 「药王秘传」，谁知道敌人竟是「药王秘传」……
t_en: Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... who would have thought our enemies would turn out to be the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

t_ch: 唉，想来太卜大人是怕打草惊蛇，才对我们秘而不宣吧。
t_en: *sigh* The master diviner must have kept it quiet to avoid alerting them.

t_ch: 云骑军的训练那么严格，怎会失控成这样？
t_en: The Cloud Knights undergo such thorough training. How could they lose control like this?

t_ch: 人受「魔阴身」的困扰也就罢了，怎么连狐人与持明也……
t_en: It's one thing for humans to be stricken with mara. But foxians and Vidyadhara...?

t_ch: 这和以前打的仗不一样！队长，这回连自己的战友都可能是敌人……
t_en: But this is different from all our previous battles! Captain, even our own comrades may become our enemies this time...

t_ch: 战友堕入魔阴身应该怎么做，当云骑的心里都有数，不要忘记你受过的训练。
t_en: Every Cloud Knight knows what they must do if their comrades become mara-struck. Don't forget your training.

t_ch: 可、可是，这不应该啊。我们还没有到岁数，还没到魔阴身的岁数……
t_en: B—But this shouldn't be happening! We're still so young — we're not old enough to be stricken with mara yet...

t_ch: 我在《云骑武经》中看过相关的记载：接触寿瘟祸祖之人，瞬间堕入魔阴…但没想到，「药王秘传」竟然真的存在，真的就在我们身边。
t_en: There are records of such a phenomenon in the Cloud Knights Martial Doctrine. Those who come into contact with the Plagues Author become mara-struck instantly... I never thought the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were real, or so close to us.

t_ch: 我、我、我不知道接下来咱们队伍中还会有多少人……
t_en: I—I don't know how many more of our soldiers will...

t_ch: 我当时只觉…身边都是敌人。脑袋里只有恨意，想一人杀出去……
t_en: I just felt there were... enemies all around me. I only felt hatred. I wanted to kill everything in my path...

t_ch: 持箓，方可行动…
t_en: Command Talisman required for operation...

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What does it mean?

t_ch: 要我们出示行动命令的意思吧。
t_en: We probably need to present it with a command for it to act.

t_ch: 云骑看守着一个喃喃自语的犯人。
t_en: The Cloud Knights are guarding a prisoner who is murmuring to himself.

t_ch: 我…看到了我看到我自己成了雷霆我看到自己变成风暴……
t_en: I... saw it... I saw myself become thunder... become a storm...

t_ch: 丹炉中的烟气…我嗅到了未来……
t_en: That scent in the elixir crucible... I could smell the future...

t_ch: 血肉泥犁困不住我…化身玄鹿我看到了枝叶伸展遮蔽穹窿，我将再度变化……
t_en: Mere flesh will not trap me... I am the Ebon Deer. I see the leaves and branches covering the sky. I will change again...

t_ch: 咱们俘虏了几个「药王秘传」的妖人，有些人疯了。他是疯得最彻底的一个。
t_en: We captured a few devils from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Some of them are already mad, and this one is the maddest.

t_ch: 那名丹士的双眼失焦，分别望着不同的方向，仿佛同时看到了一条小径分岔的两端。
t_en: The alchemist's eyes were unfocused, darting back and forth, as if he were looking at the two diverging ends of a path.

t_ch: 恩公同「药王秘传」的人说过话了？你觉得他们如何？
t_en: Have you talked with these Disciples, benefactor? What do you make of them?

t_ch: 疯狂…
t_en: They're mad...

t_ch: 是啊。可在丰饶之民看来——
t_en: True. But in the eyes of the Denizens of Abundance...

t_ch: 无视长生种的本性，遏制心魔，假扮凡人维持文明社会，就像成年人玩小孩子过家家。这是另一种疯狂。
t_en: ...ignoring the true nature of long-life species, suppressing the inner mara, maintaining the facade of mortal society... it's a child's game. Another breed of madness, perhaps.

t_ch: 可怜…
t_en: I feel sorry for them...

t_ch: 是咎由自取。仙舟联盟不允许有人触碰长生的禁忌。
t_en: They brought this upon themselves. The Xianzhou Alliance forbids anyone from accessing forbidden knowledge regarding immortality.

t_ch: 这群人索求星神的力量时，就该考虑清楚，自己是否有能力支付相应的代价。
t_en: They should have thought about whether they were capable of paying the price when seeking the power of an Aeon.

t_ch: 为了追求知识，可以理解…
t_en: I can understand their desire for knowledge...

t_ch: 您还真是胆大呢，这话也敢当着大庭广众说…还是小声些罢，若让云骑军听到，他们可不会手软的。
t_en: Shh, that's a brave thing to say out in the open... If the Cloud Knights hear you, they won't think twice.

t_ch: 恩公竟是个为达成目的不择手段的人呢。
t_en: Hehe, it strikes me that you'd use any means to achieve your goal, benefactor.

t_ch: 比起害怕死亡，仙舟人对「不死」的恐惧反而更深呢。
t_en: Xianzhou natives are more afraid of immortality than they are of the days coming to an end.

t_ch: 如愿以偿获得了长生，却要面对比死更恐怖的结局，那位「丰饶」之主真是开了个恶毒的玩笑啊。
t_en: They received eternal life as they had desired, but are doomed to a fate more terrifying than death. The Abundance played a cruel trick on them.

t_ch: 恩公有没有同这些「药王秘传」的人说过话了？你觉得他们如何？
t_en: Have you talked with these Disciples, benefactor? What do you make of them?

t_ch: 还没有…
t_en: Not yet...

t_ch: 这些家伙到底为何要背叛罗浮呢…想不明白啊。
t_en: Why would they betray the Luofu... I don't understand.

t_ch: 太卜随斥候前去探察敌情了，请您在此稍作逗留。
t_en: The master diviner has gone ahead with the scouts. Please wait here for her.

t_ch: 如今外面「药王秘传」的妖人正潜伏着，到处乱走太危险了，请您在这儿暂作停留，等太卜大人的情报吧？
t_en: There are Sanctus Medicus sorcerers hiding out there — it's too dangerous to roam. Please wait here for the master diviner's return.

t_ch: 等太卜回来，咱们可能要面对一场硬仗了…害得我都有些紧张了。
t_en: When the Master Diviner gets back, we might be in for tough times... It's making me a little nervous.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你做好准备了吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

t_ch: 准备好了。
t_en: Ready.

t_ch: 还没，得好好准备一番…
t_en: Not yet...

t_ch: 咳咳，现在开始练习闭气，应该不算晚……
t_en: *coughing* What? It's not too late to practice holding my breath...

t_ch: 你看起来没事啊…
t_en: You seem quite alright...

t_ch: 离丹炉还很远哩。本座虽不通药理，但也知道抛开剂量谈毒性是纸上谈兵……
t_en: We're still far from the elixir crucibles. I'm no healer, but I do know that dosage is important in the application of poisons...

t_ch: 哼，虽然如此…本座心里面还是怕得要死！本座还年轻，不想这么快就坠入魔阴身啊！
t_en: Hmph, even so... Okay I admit it — I'm terrified! I'm still young! I don't wanna become mara-struck so soon!

t_ch: 那你还是退回本阵好了。
t_en: Then you'd better return to the home front.

t_ch: 那怎么成！景元将云骑交托给我，连身先士卒都做不到，还想继任将军…咳，还想服众吗？
t_en: Out of the question! Jing Yuan gave me authority over the Cloud Knights. If I can't even stand on the front lines, then how can I succeed him as general? *cough* How can I win the hearts of the people!?

t_ch: 万一你现在暴起发病…
t_en: But if your condition worsens...

t_ch: 本座的运势涨落在兑、乾之间，当机立断便能不受其害。所以别多说话动摇我！！
t_en: My fortune is fluctuating between the marsh and heaven trigrams — I can avert disaster by being decisive. So stop talking to me and distracting me!

t_ch: 本座会竭力维持神智，剩下的便靠你们了。
t_en: I'll focus on keeping my sanity. The rest is up to you.

t_ch: 那股烟雾真的对我们无害？
t_en: Is that smoke really safe though?

t_ch: 信不过本座是吧！
t_en: Do you not trust me?

t_ch: 咳…要是本座说「不知道」，你该不会立即撂挑子不干吧？
t_en: *coughing* ...If I told you I wasn't certain, would you turn back on the spot?

t_ch: 你居然一点把握也没有？
t_en: You don't have the slightest clue, do you?

t_ch: 胡说，本座很有把握！没问题的！
t_en: Nonsense! I'm very certain! One-hundred percent!

t_ch: 算一卦吧。
t_en: Do a divination.

t_ch: 不用算。本座除术数占卜外，直觉也很准！
t_en: No need. Aside from divinations and calculations, my instincts are accurate too!
